linting.notes: Ruff enforces line length of 100, rules F (pyflakes), E (pycodestyle errors), W (warnings), I (isort), N (naming). Claudelint validates Claude plugin structure with custom rules in .claudelint-custom.py.

testing.notes: No automated tests exist. This repository contains AI helper plugins/scripts that are validated through linting only. The 'make update' target verifies that helper scripts (update_claude_settings.py, build-website.py) run successfully but does not test their correctness.

ci.notes: The lint workflow runs on all pushes and PRs to main. The build workflow runs on pushes/PRs to main when images/** or the workflow file changes, and also runs nightly at 2 AM UTC. Build workflow builds multi-platform (linux/amd64, linux/arm64) images and pushes to ghcr.io. The make lint target includes: claudelint, ruff check, ruff format check, shellcheck, and validates that 'make update' doesn't generate uncommitted changes.

build.notes: Build system uses Makefile. 'make build' builds both Claude and Cursor container images. System dependencies required: make, shellcheck, podman/docker. The 'make update' target regenerates Claude settings and website data using Python scripts.

conventions.import_style: Standard Python imports, organized with isort (enforced by ruff)
conventions.notes: Python scripts located in scripts/ and helpers/skills/*/scripts/. Shell scripts use .sh extension. Plugins organized under helpers/ with subdirectories: agents/, commands/, gems/, skills/. Categories defined in categories.yaml.

container_recipe.notes: Claudelint requires podman-in-podman setup which is complex in containers. For full validation including claudelint, use the host's podman directly: podman run --rm -v $(pwd):/workspace:Z ghcr.io/stbenjam/claudelint:main -v --strict

results.command: pip install --upgrade pip && pip install ruff PyYAML

results.output_snippet: ✓ Claude settings and marketplace updated successfully!

Website data written to /app/docs/data.json
Total tools: 34

validation.summary: All validated commands passed: install OK, ruff check OK, ruff format OK, shellcheck OK, scripts OK (no tests)

gaps: No automated tests - this repository has no test suite
